     the Fermi energy is    -0.3476 ev

!    total energy              =   -7324.03325255 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          9.6E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.18647382 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -7323.84677873 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -151378.38392532 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   76394.48654599 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2813.85653608 Ry
